questionHtml:
A working refrigerator with the door open is placed in a sealed room.

The entropy of the room


A.  is zero.

B.  decreases.

C.  remains unchanged.

D.  increases.

meta.title: A working refrigerator with the door open is placed in a sealed room. The entropy of the room A. is zero. B. decreases. C. remains unchanged. D. increases.
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
